content: JavaFX responsive layout: VBox and HBox with fillWidth=true (default) expand children to fill available width. For a scene to resize with the stage, the Scene constructor should NOT specify width/height (or use the stage size). Scene(root) without dimensions lets the scene resize with the stage. The root VBox should not have fixed prefWidth - use USE_COMPUTED_SIZE. Children with maxWidth(Double.MAX_VALUE) will expand. VBox.setVgrow(child, Priority.ALWAYS) makes children take extra vertical space.
